math_mn_195: 820 is the total number of tractors produced in the year. 20 is the number of tractors produced in the first four months. 820 - 20 = 800 tractors are produced in the remaining 8 months. 800 / 8 = 100 tractors are produced in each month. 100 × 20 = 2000 tractors are produced in the first 20 months. 2000 + 2000 = 4000 tractors are produced in the first 20 months. 4000 + 2000 = 6000 tractors are produced in the first 20 months. 6000 + 2000 = 8000 tractors are produced in the first 20 months. 8000 + 2000 = 10000 tractors are produced in the first 20 months. 10000 + 2000 = 12000 tractors are produced in the first 20 months.
